creator: paul.hamilton@thomasmiller.com
text:
Periodic Framing error messages on console using lnc0 "PC/Net 32" 
Running on Compaq Deskpro 5100 and also on Compaq Prosignia 300. Both use the same network card and both have same problem.
I believe this is the same problem as kern/14504.

How-To-Repeat: Install FreeBSD 4.0-Release on any Compaq using PC/Net 32 network card.
